name: Signal Detect and Measure
description: Condition a raw signal, extract discrete events, and compute a downstream rate from those events.

inputs.name: signal
inputs.constraints: Preserve waveform semantics until event extraction.

inputs.name: sampling_rate
inputs.constraints: Retain the source sampling context for every downstream stage.

outputs.name: rate
outputs.constraints: Expose a rate series with enough support to explain plausibility and gaps.

planning_constraints: Keep waveform conditioning separate from event extraction.
Do not introduce irreversible loss before event detection.
Preserve sampling-rate provenance through detection and rate estimation.

stages.name: Filter Signal For Detection
stages.description: Filter or denoise the raw signal into a conditioned waveform for downstream event extraction.
stages.dejargonized_description: Clean the raw trace so the important peaks stand out without throwing away the timing information.
preconditions: A waveform input and valid sampling rate are available.
guarantees: The output remains a waveform aligned to the input time base.

stages.name: Detect Peaks In Signal
stages.description: Detect salient peaks or events in the conditioned signal.
stages.dejargonized_description: Find the beat-like moments in the cleaned trace without inventing a new clock.

inputs.name: sampling_rate
inputs.constraints: Sampling rate must match the conditioned waveform.

preconditions: The conditioned signal still preserves the waveform timing context.
guarantees: The output is an event sequence tied to the source waveform.

stages.name: Compute Event Rate
stages.description: Compute a target rate or cadence from inter-event intervals.
stages.dejargonized_description: Turn the detected beats into a rate trace and keep enough evidence to explain whether the estimate is trustworthy.

outputs.name: rate
outputs.constraints: Rate series and aligned support coordinates.

preconditions: Event ordering is monotone and retains source timing context.
guarantees: The output is a rate series backed by the detected events.

edges.provenance: Same waveform stream and sampling context.
Events must preserve the source timing basis.

audit.rationale: This family caused repeated refinement failures and is the first high-leverage candidate for explicit skeleton auditability.
audit.dejargonized_summary: Clean the signal, find the beats, then compute the rate while keeping track of what information is allowed to disappear at each step.
provenance_notes: Transitional local asset until canonical ownership moves into ../sciona-atoms.
uncertainty_notes: Peak-correction and quality-control branches are deferred to the expansion-family phase.

references.title: Constraint-Driven Synthesis And Refinement Plan
references.note: Framework rationale for promoting family scaffolds into audited assets.

references.title: Phase 2 Skeleton Asset Plan
references.note: Defines the local compatibility-layer requirements for auditable skeleton assets.
